title: White House dinner shooting suspect appears in court

title: Shooting shows White House ballroom needed, Trump and allies say

title: Supreme Court upholds Texas redrawn congressional map, democrats react
shortDescription: The Supreme Court approved Texas's redrawn congressional map, sparking outrage from Democrats who call it 'racist.'

title: Trump says 'I'm not a pedophile' in interview

title: Trump welcomes King Charles, Queen Camilla to the White House
shortDescription: The state visit will be King Charles III's first U.S. trip since his 2022 coronation and is being framed as a chance to repair U.S.-U.K. relations.
